premise: A dramatic quote video layers one persistent armored king figure over changing fantasy landscape plates while a line of text is revealed one word at a time.
plot_type: single-word quote reveal over persistent hero cutout and swappable scenic plates

cast.description: A dark armored king or knight stands in the lower center across nearly the whole clip. This figure behaves like a reusable foreground asset.

continuity_rules: The armored king overlay should remain stable across the full short.
Backgrounds can change freely as long as they stay within a warm fantasy or medieval-painting aesthetic.
Text should appear as one centered serif word at a time, with white fill and dark shadow.
The opening split-curtain reveal is part of the recognizable hook and should stay editable as code-driven transition logic.
Any extra background figures belong to the scenic plate and do not count as persistent cast.

supporting_character_policy.rationale: Only the foreground armored king needs continuity. Any secondary figure inside a background painting should stay part of the swappable background asset.

scene_arc.beat: Use a black split-curtain reveal to introduce the visual style.
Establish the core grammar: changing scenic plates, persistent king overlay, and single-word quote reveals.
Continue the quote with darker and denser fantasy plates.
Close the sequence with the final words over warm forest imagery.
